verses.text: Topa in kei hong hopih a, “Judah kumpipa' inn-ah va paisuk in la, hih bangin va gen in
David tokhom tungah a tu Judah kumpipa aw, nang leh na nasemte-a kipan hih kongpi-ah a hong lut na gammite khempeuh in Topa' kammal ngai dih un

Topa in a cihin-ah, thumanin diktat un la, a bawlsiate' khutsung panin bawlsiatna a thuak mite honkhia un. Minam dangte, pa neilote leh meigongte simmawhbawl khaloin amau' tungah ngongtat kei un la, hih munah zong mawhna neilo mite that kei un

Bang hang hiam cih leh note in hih thute na zuih takpi uh leh David' suante kumpi suak tawntung ding uh a, amaute-a kipan a nasemte uh leh a mite uh sakol leeng leh sakol tungah tuangin hih inn kongpite-ah hong lut ding uh hi
Ahih hangin note in hih thute na zuih kei uh leh keimah Topa in kong genin-ah, hih inn gamlak a suaksak dingin ka kiciam hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh Judah kumpi inn tawh kisai-in Topa in kong cihin-ah: Nang pen Gilead gam ahi a, Lebanon mual bangin ahi zongin na hoih mahmah hi. Ahih hangin nang sehnel gam kong suaksak ding a, kuamah a ten'lohna khua kong suaksak ding hi
Nang' langkhatah a hong susia ding mi ka kithawisak ding a, a hei uh hong keng ding uh hi. Amaute in na sidar khuam hoihpente hong phuksakin mei-ah hong khulsak ding uh hi
“Tua ciangin minam dang tampi in hih khuapi kantan ding uh a, a innsak a innkhangte' kiangah, ‘Bang hangin hih khuapi lian hici bawl ahi hiam,’ ci-in khatlekhat a kidong ding uh hi
Tua ciangin, ‘A Pasian uh Topa' thuciamna taisan uh a, pasian dang peuh bia-in a na a sepsak man uh ahi hi,’ ci-in a kidawngkik ding uh hi, va ci in,” hong ci hi
Judah mite aw, misipa Josiah kah kei un la, khasiat kei un. A kipaikhiatpih Shallum hangin nakpi takin kapzaw un. Bang hang hiam cih leh a pian'na gam a mu dingin amah hong kilehkik nawnlo ding hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Judah kumpipa Josiah' za a luah a tapa, hih mun panin a paikhiapa Shallum thu tawh kisai-in Topa in, “Amah hong kilehkik nawnlo ding a
salin a kikaihna munah a si ding hi. Hih gam a mukik nawn kei ding hi,” a ci hi
Thumanlopi-in inn lam a, zuauthu tawh inndei tungnung a lam mi, ama na a mawkna-in a inn vengte a semsak mi, thaman a pialo mi in gimna thuak ta hen
“Inndei tungnung zapi a awng inn gol khat ka lam ding hi,” ci-in tawlet vangte bawl a, taamtak singpeek tawh thuap sawm a, za san a zut mi in gimna thuak ta hen
Taamtak sing tawh inn na lam manin kumpi kisa na hi hiam? Na pa in an ne tui dawn a, thumanna leh diktatna tawh na a sep manin a maa pai hilo ahi hiam
Amah in mizawngte leh mi cimawhte thuman tawh thu khen a, na khempeuh a hoih a suak pah hi. Tu-a banga hihna pen kei nong theihna uh hilo ahi hiam, Topa in kong ci hi
Ahih hangin note in thumanlo tawh ngahna ding ahi zongin, mimawh lote' sisan luan'na ding ahi zongin, mi nuaisiahna leh ngongtatna ding ahi zongin, na mitte uh leh na lungsim uh na zang uh hi

Tua ahih manin Judah kumpipa Josiah' tapa Jehoiakim thu tawh kisai-in Topa in hih bangin kong ci hi: “Amaute in, ‘Sanggampa aw,’ ‘Sanggamnu aw,’ ci-in a sih ciangun a kikah bangun amah a sih ciangin a kah kei ding uh a, ‘ Topa aw, kumpipa aw,’ ci-in zong a kah kei ding uh hi
La si a kiphum bang lelin amah kivui ding a, Jerusalem kongpi pualamah kikai talin kipaai ding hi,” a ci hi
Jerusalem khua mite aw, Lebanon Mual tungah kahto-in awng un la, Bashan gamah va kiko un. Abarim mualtungah va kiko un; bang hang hiam cih leh na pawlte un gal lel khin hi
Na daupai laitakun kong hopih hangin na hong ngai nuam kei uh hi. Na neu tung uha kipan nong tuacih ngitnget uh a, keima thu nong mang ngei kei uh hi
Na makaite uh huih in hong mut mangsak ding a, na pawlte uh salin kiman ding uh hi. Tua ciangin na gitlohna uh hangin maizumin na lung-am ding uh hi
Lebanon gam panin a kila taamtak inn sungah nuamtakin na teng uh hi. Ahih hangin gimna hong tun' ciangin bangzah takin na tau ding uh hiam? Numei nausuak dingte tawh na kibang ding uh hi
Topa in Jehoiakim tapa Judah kumpipa Jehoiakhin tungah, “Kei a nungta Pasian ka hih mah bangin, nangmah in ka taklam khutah a om ka letmatthuhna tawh a kibang na hih hangin nang kong lakhia ding a
na kihtak, nang hong thatnuamte' khutsungah kong pia ding hi. Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar leh Khaldea mite' khutsungah nang kong pia ding hi
Nangmah leh nang hong paai na nu, na suahna mun uh a hilo gamdangah kong lawnkhia ding a, tua laitakah na si ding uh hi
Na ciahkik nopna gam uhah na ciahkik thei nawn kei ding uh hi,” a ci hi
Jehoiakhin, kuama deihloh a kipaimang beel kitam tawh kibang ta ahi hiam? Bang hangin amah leh a tate kilawnkhia a, a theihloh uh gamah kipaimang ahi hiam
Aw ka gam, ka gam aw, Topa' kammal ngai dih ve'n
Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Hihpa, ta neilopa, a khan' tawntungin a gualzo ngeilopa, ci-in ciamteh un. Ama suanlekhakte khat beek in David' tokhom luahlo ding a, Judah gam a uk kei ding hi,” a ci hi.
